title: T-013 — API: PO approval / rejection (FR-PLAN-008)
prompt:
Implement approval-flow Server Actions per PRD §6.2 FR-PLAN-008. Endpoints:
- POST /api/planning/purchase-orders/:id/approve  body { notes? } — caller role must intersect planning_settings.po_approval_roles. Transitions pending_approval→confirmed; sets approved_at, approved_by.
- POST /api/planning/purchase-orders/:id/reject  body { notes (required, min 10 chars) } — transitions pending_approval→draft, audit logged.

Use rule registry (T-007). Outbox events emitted per side-effect contract.

RED test asserts (a) approver-role check rejects callers outside list; (b) reject without notes ≥ 10 chars returns 400; (c) approved_at/by populated; (d) outbox emits.

pipeline_inputs.description: PO approve/reject Server Actions with role gate and reason validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Caller's roles read from session JWT (RBAC matrix from 02-SETTINGS §10). RBAC check happens BEFORE rule engine call. notes minLength=10 enforced via Zod. approved_at populated to NOW() and approved_by to user.id only on approve action. Reject keeps approved_at/by NULL.
acceptance_criteria: Given a caller without any role in planning_settings.po_approval_roles, when approve is called, then HTTP 403 with code 'PO_APPROVE_FORBIDDEN'.
Given a reject call with notes='ok' (4 chars), when validated, then HTTP 400 with Zod error citing min length 10.
Given a successful approve, when the PO is fetched, then status='confirmed', approved_at is set, and outbox event 'po.state_changed' exists.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/po-approval.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for RBAC denial, Zod min-length on reject reason, approve happy path with audit columns set.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass RBAC — V-PLAN-PO-005 is a hard block.
Do not allow reject with empty notes — audit trail integrity.
